Input
0 0
1 1

Output
0 XNOR24 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR35 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR46 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
3 XNOR57 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
